creator: nipkraps@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214861
Patch to remove outdated warning about offensive fortunes in fortune(6)'s README

My apologies if this is better suited for the Documentation category.

This patch removes the warning from fortune(6)'s README about offensive fortunes being distributed with FreeBSD by default. This hasn't been true since base r325828, when all fortune files besides freebsd-tips were removed. I am fairly confident that the contents of freebsd-tips ought to be inoffensive enough to not warrant this warning.
